Added from dead card, 2025: 
 Locality: Base of Mt. Shasta, road up mt. from town of Mt. Shasta, Siskyou Co., being cleared for Penny Pines Plantation. Ca. 4000 ft. alt. Very fine sand with little clay, some rocks. humus in upper layer from shrubs (manzanita, Prunus, Rhamnus).

Added from dead card, 2025: 
 Locality: Came in soil with 63.1205 (Fritillaria purdyi Eastw.) - 1.5 mi. of Plasket Meadow Camp. Glenn Co., 29-VI-63. S facing slope, full sun, very little plant competition - small grasses, and annuals and a few low shrubs. Sandy, gritty, gravelly soil with mica schist rock outcroppings. Many bulbs in crevices of rocks.

source: Date John J. Lavranos, So. Africa via J.W. Dodson (Int. Succ. Inst. ), Millbrae, Calif.

Added from dead card, 2025: 
 Locality: Santa Cruz I., Calif., First canyon E. of Prisoners Harbor, 26-IV-65. 200-250 ft. alt. S facing S teep slope to cliff. Full sun. Mostly rock outcrops heavily covered with some oaks, poison oak, cactus, morning glory, mimulus, coreopsis gigantia, Delphinium, Dudleya, grasses, Very gritty soil with some humus.
